auth.notAdmin: Only administrator accounts can sign in here.

prompts.title: Prompt Management
prompts.guardPlaceholder: Define prohibitions, anti-hallucination rules, and output limits.
prompts.taskPlaceholder: Define the work to perform and decision criteria.
prompts.outputPlaceholder: Define response format, language, and structure.
prompts.userPromptPlaceholder: User prompt with variables such as {{experiences}}
prompts.sectionHint: Edit by section. On save, sections are composed into the system prompt automatically.
prompts.needTwoVersions: At least two versions are required to compare.

aiLogs.title: AI Logs / Usage
aiLogs.empty: No AI usage logs yet. Try running generation in the workspace.

deploySettings.title: Deploy CI Settings
deploySettings.subtitle: Enable or disable E2E tests that run automatically after each master push.
deploySettings.aiE2eDesc: After deploy, Playwright validates experience → job → RAG → resume generation. Uses significant Gemini API quota.
deploySettings.e2eDesc: Validates landing, signup, and workspace UI flows. Does not use LLM.
deploySettings.note2: Changes apply from the next push deploy. No Docker restart required.
deploySettings.loadError: Could not load settings. Make sure you are signed in with an administrator account.

llmSettings.title: LLM Provider Settings
llmSettings.subtitle: Manage API keys, models, and failover order. On 429/errors, the next priority route is used automatically.
llmSettings.providersDesc: Save a key, then enable the provider to use it in routes.
llmSettings.routesDesc: Priority 1 is primary, 2 is fallback, etc. Use the provider's model ID exactly.
llmSettings.note1: Set INTERNAL_API_TOKEN and LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY in server .env so resume-ai can read DB keys.
llmSettings.note2: When Gemini free tier (5 RPM) is exhausted, traffic falls back to OpenAI, GitHub Models, Groq, etc.
llmSettings.note3: Manage LLM API keys in Admin only. Keep INTERNAL_API_TOKEN, LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY, and EMBEDDING_DIMENSION in .env.
